/usr/bin/ar qc libTestCompares.a CMakeFiles/TestCompares.dir/C2HDM.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestCompares.dir/R2HDM.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestCompares.dir/N2HDM.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestCompares.dir/CPINTHEDARK.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestCompares.dir/CXSM.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestCompares.dir/SM.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestCompares.dir/__/__/src/minimizer/MinimizeGSL.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestCompares.dir/__/__/src/minimizer/Minimizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestCompares.dir/__/__/src/minimizer/MinimizePlane.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestCompares.dir/__/__/src/minimizer/LibNLOPT/MinimizeNLOPT.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libTestCompares.a
